spec.reasoning: Previous attempts with title_row_insert and distractor_column all failed because the instruction references columns E, F, and H by letter, and any column insertion shifts those positions. Title row insert shifts row numbers. The risk flag data_values_match_headers means 'Georgia Its Tax' appears as both a column K header and data values in column E - this text is explicitly referenced in the instruction so it cannot be renamed (Rule 6). The safest perturbation is lexical-only: renaming columns not referenced in the instruction (account→acct_id, state→region, Date→Trans_Date, Check→Check_No). These are same-level renames (abbreviation to abbreviation, full word to full word). Layout is skipped to avoid breaking column/row position references.
